gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/102)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/102)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ أَخْلَفَ بِالْأَمَانَةِ
وَ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الْأَمَانَةُ تَجْلِبُ الرِّزْقَ وَ الْخِيَانَةُ تَجْلِبُ الْفَقْرَ.

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘He is not from us<sup>asws</sup>, the one who reneges with an entrustment’.
And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The trustworthiness brings the livelihood and the betrayal brings the poverty’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy, who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘One who does not keep a trust safely is not of our people/ The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Trustworthiness attracts wealth and treachery attracts poverty.’”
